output: An outreach-status and reviewer-appointment document committed via PR, recording contacts, responses, and named reviewer/counsel.
acceptanceCriteria: Outreach to LoC Labs is initiated and the status (response, no-response, or in-conversation) is documented honestly.
Outreach to the By the People / Concordia program is initiated to understand the contribution pathway.
A named qualified rights reviewer is identified and has accepted the role; their qualifications are documented.
Counsel or a qualified rights/IP attorney is engaged or identified for review of the rights/vocabulary.yml ruleset.
A fallback is documented: if the rights-reviewer seat is empty, no determination advances, no fan-out, escalate to Elyos governance/board.
The outreach status and reviewer/counsel names are recorded in a committed document.
objective: Begin outreach to LoC Labs and By the People (Concordia); identify, vet, and secure a named qualified rights reviewer and counsel for the vocabulary ruleset to satisfy the hard M0 exit criterion; document the fallback if the seat remains empty.
context: M0 cannot exit until a qualified rights reviewer and counsel for the vocabulary ruleset is named, which is a hard exit criterion, not a soft one. In parallel, outreach to LoC Labs and the By the People (Concordia) program should start early to establish API-etiquette guidance and explore collaboration. Without a named rights reviewer, no determination advances past needs-review and no item is fanned out. See PLAN.md (Governance section, M0 exit criteria f and g).
title: LoC Labs / By the People outreach + name rights reviewer and counsel
